entity.summary: Automated-market-maker decentralized exchange on Aurora EVM providing token swaps and liquidity pools under the WannaSwap brand, with continuing on-chain liquidity and trading activity.
entity.notes: The historical first-party application domain did not yield a stable current response in this review pass, so URL status remains unknown. The project-owned code organization and independent current protocol metrics establish continuing exchange identity and operation. HEI keeps the Aurora deployment and protocol contracts under one entity.

evidence.title: WannaSwap official code organization
evidence.notes: The project-owned organization identifies WannaSwap as an AMM on Aurora EVM and publishes the core contracts, subgraph, token assets, and related exchange repositories.

evidence.title: WannaSwap protocol trading metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report current non-zero Aurora TVL and DEX volume for WannaSwap, corroborating active exchange operation.
